hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding and review workflows tailored for MiCA compliance across CASPs and digital asset businesses.

problem_title: Onboarding slows with disconnected KYC and KYB
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to unify customer and corporate checks across fragmented tools in MiCA-specific environments. This separation creates audit gaps and delays review workflows critical for jurisdictional onboarding and ongoing compliance.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies identity and corporate checks into a single MiCA-focused onboarding workflow that links provider results, reviewer actions, regulatory updates and audit evidence for consistent compliance operations.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to MiCA approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific KYC and KYB checks through risk-based review, case management, decision logging and evidence preservation for MiCA compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific KYC and KYB outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and evidence to support MiCA compliance and audit-ready onboarding operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports CASPs with provider-neutral orchestration, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment to meet jurisdiction-specific KYC and KYB regulatory standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for MiCA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer helping CASPs structure MiCA-specific onboarding, regulatory monitoring, case management and reporting workflows within jurisdictional requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support MiCA KYC and KYB workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates KYC and KYB checks with MiCA policies to route reviews, manage risk thresholds, trigger cases and maintain audit-ready decision logs across jurisdictions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by securely linking provider outputs, regulatory rules, reviewer actions and decisions into traceable, version-controlled records suitable for audits or regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects and consolidates outputs from your existing KYC and KYB providers into structured workflows without disrupting current onboarding tools or processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers for MiCA?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but integrates their outputs to create structured, compliant workflows and audit trails tailored for MiCA readiness.
final_title: Structure MiCA KYC and KYB workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into compliant onboarding, case workflows and audit-ready evidence for MiCA compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
